abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Extended Reach
abilities.text: Enemy models within 2" cannot take attack actions generated by the Charge action.

abilities.name: You're Going to Regret That
abilities.text: After the opposing player gains any VP from a Scheme, this model may declare an action.

actions.name: Naginata
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Move the target up to 2" away from this model.

triggers.name: Mortal Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, damage dealt is irreducible.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: You're Comin' With Me
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3", then place this model into base contact with it.

actions.name: Endure It
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Target heals 2. For each raise this action receives, the target heals an additional +1.

triggers.name: I've Got Your Back!
triggers.text: Engaged ally only. Target is placed in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Heroic Intervention
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy engaged with another friendly model only. Move all friendly models engaged with the target 5" away from the target. Then, place this model in base contact with the target. This model may declare a (melee) targeting the target.

triggers.name: Thwarted Agenda
triggers.text: Enemy only. Target must remove an enemy Scheme marker from anywhere in play. If it cannot, it is dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Inspiration
triggers.text: This model gains a Focused token.
